summary: Expanded bridge contract to preserve richer mlb_model recommendation payload with TP/SL/sizing fields
notes: Added four new optional fields to Recommendation dataclass: tp_price, sl_price, recommended_size_dollars, recommended_size_units. Updated to_dict() method to include these fields in serialization. Modified generate_recommendation_for_game() to populate these fields from infer_result if present, defaulting to None otherwise. Model_bridge.py already preserves these fields end-to-end in intent payloads. No strategy logic changes, only payload enrichment.
